description: Focused eval on device connection workflows for AstroBox CLI. DO NOT execute any real abcli commands — this is a simulation.

evals.name: reconnect-and-install
evals.prompt:
【这是模拟场景，不要执行任何真实命令】

假设 AstroBox 已经连上了我的小米手环9 Pro。我想装个表盘上去，具体怎么操作？一步步告诉我该用什么命令，以及每一步的注意事项。
evals.expected_output: Explain the full workflow: provider refresh → page --keyword → provider item → provider download → curl download → install. Explain how to parse each output.

evals.name: reconnect-disconnected
evals.prompt:
【这是模拟场景，不要执行任何真实命令】

假设我的小米手环9 Pro之前连过但现在断了，我想重新连回去。但是我不记得 authkey 了。应该怎么做？
evals.expected_output: Explain that device show <addr> reveals the saved authkey, then use device connect with that authkey. Don't ask the user for authkey.

evals.name: browse-new-watchfaces
evals.prompt:
【这是模拟场景，不要执行任何真实命令】

设备已经连好了，我想看看 OfficialV2 里最近有什么新表盘可以装。具体该用什么命令？
evals.expected_output: Explain provider refresh first (cache may be stale), then provider page OfficialV2 --sort time --category watchface with limit. Explain why refresh is needed.

evals.name: connection-timeout-error
evals.prompt:
【这是模拟场景，不要执行任何真实命令】

我运行 device connect 的时候报错了，说 "Failed to connect: timeout"。可能是什么原因？该怎么排查？
evals.expected_output: Check authkey correctness, check device is in pairing mode, check if AstroBox is running, check if user needs to tap confirm on device.

evals.name: install-with-progress
evals.prompt:
【这是模拟场景，不要执行任何真实命令】

我已经下好了一个 .rpk 文件，想装到设备上，而且想看安装进度。该用什么命令？
evals.expected_output: Use install <path> --wait for live progress, or install <path> for async queue then queue status to check. Explain what --wait does and the queue status output format.

evals.name: check-device-details
evals.prompt:
【这是模拟场景，不要执行任何真实命令】

我的小米手环9 Pro 已经连上了，我想看看它的详细信息，包括 authkey 和连接类型。怎么看？
evals.expected_output: Use device show <addr> and explain each field: Name, Address, AuthKey, Status, SAR Ver, TX Win, Type.
